chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENGH AT SUKKUR C, P No. D - 15tg of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Hon'ble Judge Fresh case For orders on office objection at flag'A' For orders on CMA No.6533/20'19 (Ex.A) For orders on CMA No.6534/2019 (S/A) For hearing of main case 30-o3-2022 Mr. Abdul Hafeez, Advocate, holds brief on behalf of Mr' Ashok Kumar K.Jambha, Counsel, for the Petitioner and under instructions does not press instant Petition.
